raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XLVII. Nodalla.
Sluddinaſchana prett Babeli : 1. Ka tai pa-
schai ſawas neschehligas ſirds pehz : 5/16.
Lepnibas : 7. Kahribas : 8. Burwibas : 9
un Elka Deewibas pehz bij iſpohſtitai
tapt : 14."
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Raufajt mannis / juhs /
kam greſnas ſirdis ir-
ratd / kas juhs tahſt
eſtat wo tahs Taifnibas,
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es efinu ſawu Taifnibu
tuwu atneſsis/ ta ne buhs tahſtu/
un manna Peſtiſchana ne kawe-
fees/ jo es dohſchu Peſtiſchana
eekſch Zianas / eekſch Iſraeta
mannu Godibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "6. Es biju duſmigs pahr
manneem ſandint/ es fagabniſju
mannu eenuntojamn Leezu/ un
nodewu tohs tawa Robſa. Bek
tu ne parahdiſti wtaſeem Scheb-
laſibu/ tr pahr teem Wezzeem
darriji tu tawon \ Juhglo lohti
gnuhtu/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tu fazziji: Es buhschu
unbſchaim weena Rehnininne/
lihds ſchahmebr tu ſchihs Leetas
tie eſſi pee ſirds nehmuſi/ tu ne
eſſi us winno Galla Dohnioſſi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad / klauti ſcho / tu
kahra/ kaſt tu bes Bibjaschanas
fehdi/ un fakki tawi ſirdi: Es!
un nekahda zitta wattol/ es ne
valiffchu par Atraitnit/ un ne-
augliga es ne buhschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tomehr ſchihs diwi Leetas
weena Azzumirſki pahr tewim
nahks weena Deena/ ta Behru
Aplaupiſchana/ un ta Atraitni-
ba/ ar pillu Mehru tahs pahr
tewi nahks/ tawas leelas Bur-
ſchanas deht/ un tawas warren
leelas Apmahneſchanas deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tu eſſi us tawu Ble-
dib u paſahuwees/ tu eſſi fazziji-
ſi: Neweenis manni reds. Tawa
Gndriba un tawa Siunaſchana
ta irr tewi nogreſuſi/ un tu eſſi
tawa ſirdi fazzijiſti: Es! un ne-
weena wairs ka es.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht nahks pahr tewi
Caunums / un tu ne funaſt
winna Gefabtumi/ un us tewi
frttihs weena Samoitaſchana/
fo tu ne warrei palihdsinahe/ jo
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
